name: Bash
description: Executes bash commands in a persistent shell session. IMPORTANT: Before using this tool, you *MUST* read ~/.claude/context/CLAUDE.bash-preferences.md.

command.description: The command to execute (honoring the user's bash-preferences)

description.description: Clear, concise description of what this command does in 5-10 words

run_in_background.description: Set to true to run this command in the background
